title: Minecraft BUT 1M Deaths
description:
Collect deaths and buy deadly items!

Content meant for Youtube Creators - Watermarked version
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/qtHR0vvo5Qw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---------
The content here published is a recreation of the mod used from Craftee in the youtube video "Minecraft BUT I Survive 1,000,000 Deaths".
_(All assets, code, and resources are made from scratch)_

I recreated it some months ago and now posting it here, **with a markdown** to avoid commercial use.

Differences from the content in the video?
- Coffin Chester removed and added "x2 Multiplier"
+ Added x2, x4 and x8 ability.

How to play?
- Download the mod
- Install Fabric Loader 1.19.4 and dependencies
- Place API and mod in the .minecraft/mods folder
- And play!
